plugins.name: Case Init + Tool Versions
plugins.description: CASE_CONTEXT.json, RUN_LEDGER.jsonl, TOOL_VERSIONS.txt, DIRECTORY_MAP.txt for selected evidence folder.

plugins.name: Scope Guard (selected folder)
plugins.description: Ensures operations resolve inside the selected evidence root.

plugins.name: Evidence Inventory + SHA-256
plugins.description: Full file inventory for the selected evidence folder.

plugins.name: Validate DFIR Toolchain
plugins.description: Writes TOOLCHAIN_LOCK.json (Python, SAF/sysdiag, MVT, UAC, osquery, Velociraptor, YARA, Plaso, Timesketch, plutil, log).

plugins.name: Anchor Timeline Verify
plugins.description: Validates SENTINEL anchor JSON + sidecar SHA-256 when present under sysdiagnosis.

plugins.name: Canonical Normalize (scan AI1 manifests)
plugins.description: Finds SYSDIAG_FOLDER_MANIFEST*.csv / ICLOUD_SEARCH_MANIFEST*.csv under the evidence tree and emits CANONICAL_EVENTS (fixes rel_path vs entry_path drift).

plugins.name: Sysdiagnose Killcard
plugins.description: Focused IOC / identifier hits from text artifacts (not full JSON dumps).

plugins.name: iCloud + Takeout CSV Ingest
plugins.description: CSV dialect sniff + diagnostics; never silent-empty without warnings.

plugins.name: Build forensic_index.db
plugins.description: SQLite index from inventory + canonical events + identifier regex scan.

plugins.name: Finding Confidence Scorer
plugins.description: Scores canonical keyword bundles into low/medium/high confidence rows.

plugins.name: Evidence Diff: Stratos Sysdiagnosis vs SENTINEL
plugins.description: Cross-volume recurrent identifiers (requires both volumes mounted).

plugins.name: EC-DIGIT SAF / sysdiag parse
plugins.description: Runs bundled SAF: sysdiag create on archive or unpacked sysdiagnose tree, then parse all. Output: _SAF/cases/<case>/parsed_data.

plugins.name: Run Full Folder Pipeline (ops)
plugins.description: case-init, scope-guard, inventory, killcard, iCloud ingest, index, toolchain validation.

plugins.name: Genesis Summary Scan
plugins.description: Emails, phones, UUIDs, IPs, domains, tokens summary.

plugins.name: Genesis Identifier Scan
plugins.description: Structured identifier extraction to CSV/JSON/Markdown.

plugins.name: Genesis Hash Manifest
plugins.description: Post-run SHA-256 manifest for outputs.

plugins.name: Genesis Sigma-lite Scan
plugins.description: Keyword Sigma-style rules over text artifacts.

plugins.name: Genesis YARA Scan
plugins.description: Recursive YARA over output/evidence paths.

plugins.name: IOC Enrichment (VT / AbuseIPDB)
plugins.description: Optional enrichment when API keys are present in environment.

plugins.name: OSINT Pipeline
plugins.description: Legal-first enrichment pipeline; requires _OSINT/targets.txt (build with osint_targets or manually).

plugins.name: Dark Web Counts (Apify)
plugins.description: Dark-web count lane when Apify credentials are configured; uses same targets list as OSINT pipeline.

plugins.name: Genesis Analyst Synthesis
plugins.description: Aggregates scans into Markdown/JSON/CSV; uses configured LLM when keys exist.

plugins.name: Build Lightweight Report
plugins.description: Legacy HTML/report scaffold from macapt/iLEAPP/xLEAPP folders under the case output.

plugins.name: Record Run in case_db
plugins.description: Append a row to SQLite runs ledger beside the case.

plugins.name: Plaso (Docker wrapper)
plugins.description: Official log2timeline/plaso Docker image over selected evidence.

plugins.name: Timesketch Docker Compose
plugins.description: Starts local Timesketch stack when compose dir exists.
